auth.passwordLetterRequired: Password must contain at least one letter.

auth.passwordSpecialRequired: Password must contain at least one special character.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.passwordUppercaseRequired: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.requestError: Could not authenticate. Check your credentials and try again.
